name: SYNOPSYS INC
summary: Synopsys, Inc. is a global leader in electronic design automation (EDA) software, semiconductor IP, and simulation and analysis (S&A) solutions. The company provides tools for IC design, verification, and manufacturing, including cloud-based design flows, logic libraries, embedded memories, interface IP, and security IP. Following its acquisition of ANSYS, Inc., Synopsys also offers engineering simulation and analysis software used across aerospace, automotive, healthcare, and other industries to accelerate product development.
